### Global Integrated Marketing Manager (Software & AI)-Singapore

[Plaud] Singapore

Apply

# Global Integrated Marketing Manager (Software & AI)-Singapore

#### Plaud Singapore 2 days ago 200 applicants See who Plaud has hired for this role

Apply

[Save] 

- [Report this job] 

About Plaud Inc.Plaud is building the world's most trusted AI work companion for professionals to elevate productivity and performance through note-taking solutions, loved by over 1,000,000 users worldwide since 2023. With a mission to amplify human intelligence, Plaud is building the next-generation intelligence infrastructure and interfaces to capture, extract, and utilize what you say, hear, see, and think.Plaud Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated, San Francisco-based company pushing the boundary of human–AI intelligence through a hardware–software combination. With ISO 27001, ISO 27701, GDPR, SOC 2, HIPAA, and EN 18031 compliance, Plaud is committed to the highest standards of data security and privacy protection.To learn more about Plaud, please visit https://www.plaud.ai and follow along on Instagram, X, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTubebeWhy You Should Join UsPlaud is building the next generation intelligence infrastructure and interfaces to capture, extract, and utilize intelligence from what people say, hear, see, and think.

- Market-competitive compensation, global exposure, and a vibrant, creativity-fueled work atmosphere.
- Grow your career in a culture that champions continuous learning and fast career development.
- Work with passionate teammates who value innovation, collaboration, and customer success.
- Gain exposure to cutting-edge AI for Pro tools and play a direct role in our global expansion.
- Define the next-gen paradigm for human-AI interaction.
- Plaud is a bootstrapped, skyrocketing, profitable company with a $250M revenue run rate achieved in just three years.

What You Will Do

- Build scalable campaign frameworks that improve consistency, speed, and quality across global markets.
- Use data and AI tools to track performance, optimize campaigns in real-time, and uncover insights that drive future growth.
- Partner with Product Marketing, Creative, and Regional teams to design go-to-market plans across paid, social, PR, influencer, and owned channels.
- Turn product strategy into compelling, multi-channel campaigns that connect hardware, AI & software, and platform stories into one seamless narrative.
- Lead end-to-end planning and execution of global campaigns for Plaud’s software and AI products.

Minimum Qualifications

- Good at using AI tools to improve work efficiency
- Fluent in English; proactive, detail-oriented, and a strong team player.
- Comfortable working with creative and media partners, managing assets and approvals.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills across global teams.
- Strong organizational
role_fit_rationale: Marketing Manager title fits, but hardware-focused consumer product misaligns with B2B SaaS preference.
skills_match_rationale: Strong integrated campaign, multi-channel, and GTM skills match well; less consumer/hardware experience.
company_snapshot: AI hardware-software startup, $250M revenue run rate, bootstrapped and profitable. Glassdoor reviews are for Plaid, not Plaud—reviews unreliable.
red_flags: Hardware company; Glassdoor reviews mismatch (Plaid vs Plaud)
standout_positives: Global scope, profitable fast-growing company, AI exposure

job_title: Marketing Senior Manager, Strategic & Growth Campaigns
description:
Aon hiring Marketing Senior Manager, Strategic & Growth Campaigns in Singapore, Singapore | LinkedIn

### Marketing Senior Manager, Strategic & Growth Campaigns

[Aon] Singapore, Singapore

Apply

# Marketing Senior Manager, Strategic & Growth Campaigns

#### Aon Singapore, Singapore 4 days ago Over 200 applicants See who Aon has hired for this role

Apply

[Save] 

- [Report this job] 

### Use AI to assess how you fit

Get AI-powered advice on this job and more exclusive features.

Am I a good fit for this job? Tailor my resume

Global Marketing Senior Manager, Strategic & Growth Campaigns Aon is in the business of better decisionsAt Aon, we shape decisions for the better to protect and enrich the lives of people around the world.As an organization, we are united through trust as one inclusive team and we are passionate about helping our colleagues and clients succeed.What The Day Will Look LikeLead and coordinate global strategic and growth marketing initiatives, ensuring alignment with brand, content and demand generation goals and business priorities.

- Provide hands-on support for communications and marketing needs, proactively identifying content gaps and new opportunities.
- Champion client-first storytelling, bringing our unique value to life across industries, risk sectors, and global markets.
- Act as a brand steward—preserving voice, tone, and story consistency across channels and touchpoints.
- Manage multiple projects with contending priorities in a complex matrix environment, always ensuring deadlines are met and outcomes exceeded.
- Support end-to-end campaign management: from ideation and strategy through to execution, measurement, and continuous improvement.
- Craft high-quality marketing content for diverse audiences, including clients, prospects, thought leadership platforms, and internal stakeholders.
- Partner with key stakeholders to shape ideas, materials, and delivery timelines.
- Translate complex business strategies into compelling, market-winning campaigns rooted in client needs and global/multinational risk perspectives.

How This Opportunity Is DifferentAs our Global Marketing Manager, Strategic & Growth Campaigns you’ll be a driving force behind strategic brand and growth campaigns, propelling our reputation in the risk management and transfer space worldwide.You’ll report to and work hand-in-hand with the Global Head of Marketing Strategy, partnering with the wider business, regional/local marketers, and other internal teams including content, brand, digital, communications, creative, media/PR amongst others.This role involves significant strategic input but is first and foremost hands-on—a “doing” role where thinking meets action. You’ll write, create, coordinate and deliver standout marketing content and impactful internal communications and colleague education and enablement content, always viewing the world through the client’s lens.Skills And Experience That Will Lead To Success

-
role_fit_rationale: Senior Manager seniority fits, but insurance industry and brand/content focus diverge from preferences.
skills_match_rationale: Campaign management and content skills align; heavy brand storytelling and copywriting focus less matched.
company_snapshot: Aon is a global insurance/risk MNC. 3.8/5 Glassdoor (6962 reviews). Good work-life balance noted.
red_flags: Insurance industry; 200+ applicants; heavy writing/brand steward focus
standout_positives: Global MNC; senior manager title; strategic campaign scope

description:
Crypto.com hiring CRM MarTech Manager in Singapore, Singapore | LinkedIn

### CRM MarTech Manager

[Crypto.com] Singapore, Singapore

Apply

# CRM MarTech Manager

#### Crypto.com Singapore, Singapore 5 days ago Be among the first 25 applicants See who Crypto.com has hired for this role

Apply [Save] 

- [Report this job] 

We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative CRM MarTech Manager to join our Global CRM team. Reporting directly to the MarTech Director, the successful candidate will play a critical role in executing our segmentation and personalisation strategies.

Responsibilities

- Translate commercial objectives into clear lifecycle goals, test plans, and KPIs
- Collaborate with Growth, Product, and Engineering stakeholders to define lifecycle strategies that enhance customer experience, activation, and retention across prediction markets
- Maintain up‑to‑date documentation (PRDs, specs, tracking plans, data flows) for all CRM initiatives
- Use templating/ scripting to enable dynamic content and complex personalisation logic in CRM campaigns
- Write API requirements and payload specifications for MarTech integrations
- Partner with Data to define metrics and dashboards that measure the impact of CRM initiatives
- Define tracking plans and event taxonomies that capture critical customer behaviours across products and platforms
- Build and maintain audience definitions and segments in the CDP for acquisition, retention, and experimentation use cases
- Analyse customer behaviour and transaction data to identify key segments, triggers, and opportunities for personalisation and upsell
- Configure and manage CDP connections (e.g. data warehouse, analytics, ad platforms, engagement tools), ensuring high data quality and reliability
- Lead the MarTech function for predictions, owning the roadmap for tools such as CDP, engagement platform, analytics, experimentation, and data pipelines

Requirements

- Strong understanding of sporting events, and options-trading
- Strong SQL skills, with the ability to query large and complex datasets, build audience definitions, and self‑serve analysis
- Experience working with growth and product teams on experimentation, funnel optimisation, and lifecycle programs
- Proven track record using CDP to drive measurable improvements in retention, engagement, and LTV
- 5+ years of hands-on experience managing Customer Data Platforms (CDP) and CRM tools in a high‑growth environment

We may use artificial intelligence tools to analyze the content of your Resume/CV against the specific requirements for the position. The purpose is to support our recruitment team in reviewing applications more effectively. These tools assist our recruitment team in their evaluation of your application by providing recommendations, but they do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans who consider the insights generated by the tools along with other relevant information.
role_fit_rationale: CRM/MarTech manager in crypto; not core marketing manager role but adjacent in fintech.
skills_match_rationale: Has CRM/marketing automation experience but lacks SQL, CDP, and API specification skills required.
company_snapshot: Crypto.com is a major global crypto exchange with Singapore presence. Glassdoor reviews mistakenly pulled for CoinGecko; sparse direct data.
red_flags: Requires sports/options-trading knowledge; heavy technical/data engineering focus
standout_positives: High-growth global fintech; strong brand recognition

description:
Multiplier hiring Field Marketing Manager - APAC in Singapore | LinkedIn

### Field Marketing Manager - APAC

[Multiplier] Singapore

Apply

# Field Marketing Manager - APAC

#### Multiplier Singapore 1 week ago 118 applicants See who Multiplier has hired for this role

Apply [Save] 

- [Report this job] 

About Job

The Field Marketing Manager position is responsible for all regional marketing supporting sales in their specific region.

A successful Field Marketing Manager plays a critical role in executing field marketing strategies and initiatives. This role involves close collaboration with cross-functional teams, including sales, marketing, and product, to drive sales pipeline growth for our Sales and Ecosystem programs.

The ideal candidate thrives in taking ownership of regional marketing programs, excels in detailed planning, and maintains proactive communication. Reporting to the Director of Regional Marketing, the Associate Field Marketing Manager will support Field Marketing Managers in delivering impactful marketing experiences aligned with our sales objectives. Additionally, this role may occasionally assist the Ecosystem Marketing Team, managing joint campaigns, coordinating partner events, and ensuring these efforts align with broader ecosystem goals.

Responsibilities

- Collaborate with GTM teams on pre-event and post-event tasks, including campaign setup in SFDC
- Ensure clear, consistent communication across all channels and with stakeholders
- Support Field Marketing Managers on campaign and event execution and strategy
- Attend and present in regional sales meetings to foster alignment with sales teams
- Coordinate workshops, Zoom setups, and logistics for events
- Assist with venue sourcing and coordinate F&B for events
- Handle financial management tasks like forecasting, payments, and reconciliation
- Manage third-party vendor contracts through the procurement process, including approvals and legal coordination
- Schedule “Know Before You Go” calls and provide on-site event support when needed
- Handle trade show orders, swag, and badges for events
- Track event details in the FMM/Sales tracker and manage event logistics
- Ensure the timely delivery and review of events workflow (asset copies, landing pages, invites, etc.)
- Create and manage event-related Slack channels
- Track event capacity, manage waitlists and registrations, and update event pages
- Ensure all events and marketing campaigns are delivered on time and within budget, measure and report on their effectiveness.

Qualifications

- Travel up to 50%.
- Experience with supporting both direct sales and channel sales teams.
- Extremely detail-oriented and organized, and able to meet deadlines.
- Exemplary communication skills without a fear of over communication. This role will require effective collaboration and coordination across internal and external stakeholders.
- 5+ years of experience.
- Past experience delivering, accelerating,
role_fit_rationale: Field marketing is adjacent but more events/logistics-focused than candidate's demand gen/digital strengths.
skills_match_rationale: SFDC, GTM collaboration, and campaign execution align; heavy event logistics focus is less matched.
company_snapshot: Multiplier is a Series C+ HR/payroll tech startup; 3.3 Glassdoor rating; reviews suggest mixed experience.
red_flags: 50% travel; role reads junior despite 'Manager' title
standout_positives: APAC regional scope; high-growth SaaS/fintech-adjacent company
